# The Software Company of Hong Kong

> Independent R&D lab building systems software, runtimes, developer tools, application platforms, operating systems, browsers, and programming languages.

Static Crepus site. Agents should fetch the Markdown/text files below instead of scraping the rendered app shell.

## Markdown

- [Full bundle](https://tsc.hk/llms-full.txt): One request with the agent guide and readable site text.
- [Agent guide](https://tsc.hk/agent.md): Fetch order and hosting notes.
